title: What If Tracking Your Net Worth Took Just 5 Minutes a Year?
description: You don't need a spreadsheet. The Financial Ledger turns one annual update into a clear picture of where your wealth is heading. Try it free. financial ledger · net worth tracker · financial ledger template · financial planning tool · financial organization · personal finance planner
